data.name: Solemn Lament

main: When used with {id:10110}, he gets +10 to his {st:BulletLament} cap, free SP on {st:ReloadLament}, and {st:Vibration} application on his skills. He'll also {st:Discard} lower rank skills when he {st:ReloadLament}s. The passive makes him inflict 1/1 {st:SinkingWhite} on hit once per turn and gives him +1 clash power.

The skill itself consumes all his {st:BulletLament} to inflict a lot of {st:SinkingWhite} and deal {kw:Gloom} damage, then {st:ReloadLament}s. It also inflicts {st:AzureTakeDamageUp} and {st:AzureResistDown} for 2 turns.

passiveList.desc:
If target has [SinkingWhite], Clash Power +1

On Hit against targets that have 15+ ([Sinking] + both [SinkingWhite]), inflict 1 [SinkingWhite](The Living) and 1 [SinkingWhite](The Departed) (once per turn; for Focused Encounters, the Part)

[AlwaysUseEGOPassive2010911]

On Hit, Base Skills inflict 2 [Vibration] on target (once per Skill)

This Identity counts as an "Identity that inflicts [Vibration] and [Sinking]"
- This Identity's Base Skills count as "Skills that inflict [Vibration] and [Sinking]"


[WhenUseEGOPassive2010911]

Maximum cap +10 for the sum of [BulletLament] Potency and Count
After [ReloadLament]ing, heal 10 SP and [Discard] 1 Base Attack Skill of the lowest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots (except "Goodbye Now, a Sorrow in You") (2 times per turn)
Turn End: If this unit had a Defense Skill equipped this turn, heal 10 SP
Turn End: When Staggered, recover from Stagger, then [ReloadLament] (once per Encounter; excluding forced Staggers)
